trend.title: Weekly concept 1: brain teaser with playful pressure

selectedGames.ideaPrompt: Autoresearch cycle 2: design a non-template casual game around "Weekly concept 1: brain teaser with playful pressure" using "Memorize and replay increasingly complex pulse sequences.". Extra twist: focus on faster session completion and punchier feedback.

Autoresearch cycle 1: design a non-template casual game around "Weekly concept 2: hyper-casual reflex challenge" using "Swipe to dodge incoming hazards and survive escalating waves.". Extra twist: add one risk/reward layer for score optimization.
